<script>/* =========================================================
   HE Tour Page — Sticky Nav Tabs + Scroll Spy (Mobile Only)
   Nav appears when hero header scrolls out of viewport
   ========================================================= */
(function () {
  if (!window.location.pathname.startsWith('/tours/')) return;

  var TAB_MAP = {
    '#tabdescription': '#tabdescription-collapse',
    '#tabatab0':       '#tabatab0-collapse',
    '#tabatab1':       '#tabatab1-collapse',
    '#tabatab2':       '#tabatab2-collapse',
    '#tabatab3':       '#tabatab3-collapse',
    '#tabphotos':      '#tabphotos-collapse',
  };

  // Labels that should never appear as nav buttons
  var EXCLUDED_LABELS = ['book the tour', 'book now', 'book'];

  var SECTION_ORDER    = Object.keys(TAB_MAP);
  var isClickScrolling = false;
  var fixedNav         = null;
  var fixedNavBtns     = {};

  function isMobile() {
    return window.matchMedia('(max-width: 991px)').matches;
  }

  function getScrollTarget(desktopHref) {
    if (isMobile()) {
      var mobileHref = TAB_MAP[desktopHref];
      return mobileHref ? document.querySelector(mobileHref) : null;
    }
    return document.querySelector(desktopHref);
  }

  function getFixedNavHeight() {
    var offset = 0;
    var adminBar = document.getElementById('wpadminbar');
    if (adminBar && adminBar.offsetHeight) offset += adminBar.offsetHeight;
    if (fixedNav  && fixedNav.offsetHeight)  offset += fixedNav.offsetHeight;
    offset += 8;
    return offset;
  }

  function getOffsetTop(el) {
    var top = 0;
    while (el) { top += el.offsetTop || 0; el = el.offsetParent; }
    return top;
  }

  function smoothScrollTo(el) {
    if (!el) return;
    var top = el.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - getFixedNavHeight();
    window.scrollTo({ top: Math.max(0, top), behavior: 'smooth' });
  }

  function setFixedActive(desktopHref) {
    Object.keys(fixedNavBtns).forEach(function (key) {
      fixedNavBtns[key].classList.toggle('he-fnav-active', key === desktopHref);
    });
    var activeBtn = fixedNavBtns[desktopHref];
    if (activeBtn) activeBtn.scrollIntoView({ inline: 'nearest', block: 'nearest' });
  }

  function setSourceActive(desktopHref) {
    var sourceNav = document.querySelector('.tours-tabs ul.nav.nav-tabs');
    if (!sourceNav) return;
    sourceNav.querySelectorAll('li').forEach(function (li) {
      li.classList.remove('active', 'he-scroll-active');
    });
    sourceNav.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(function (a) {
      a.classList.remove('active', 'he-scroll-active');
    });
    var targetA = sourceNav.querySelector('a[href="' + desktopHref + '"]');
    if (targetA) {
      targetA.classList.add('active', 'he-scroll-active');
      var li = targetA.closest('li');
      if (li) li.classList.add('active', 'he-scroll-active');
    }
  }

  function showNav() {
    if (!fixedNav) return;
    fixedNav.classList.add('he-fnav-visible');
    fixedNav.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
  }

  function hideNav() {
    if (!fixedNav) return;
    fixedNav.classList.remove('he-fnav-visible');
    fixedNav.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
  }

  function buildFixedNav() {
    if (!isMobile()) return;

    var sourceNav = document.querySelector('.tours-tabs ul.nav.nav-tabs');
    if (!sourceNav) return;

    fixedNav = document.createElement('div');
    fixedNav.id = 'he-fixed-tab-nav';
    fixedNav.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

    var inner = document.createElement('nav');
    inner.setAttribute('role', 'navigation');
    inner.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Tour sections');

    sourceNav.querySelectorAll('a[data-toggle="tab"]').forEach(function (a) {
      var desktopHref = a.getAttribute('href');
      if (!desktopHref || desktopHref.charAt(0) !== '#') return;

      // Skip excluded labels (e.g. "Book the tour")
      var label = (a.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (EXCLUDED_LABELS.indexOf(label) !== -1) return;

      if (!TAB_MAP[desktopHref]) {
        TAB_MAP[desktopHref] = desktopHref;
      }

      var btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.type = 'button';
      btn.className = 'he-fnav-btn';
      btn.dataset.desktopTarget = desktopHref;
      btn.textContent = (a.textContent || '').trim();

      btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        var scrollEl = getScrollTarget(desktopHref);
        if (!scrollEl) return;
        isClickScrolling = true;
        setFixedActive(desktopHref);
        setSourceActive(desktopHref);
        smoothScrollTo(scrollEl);
        setTimeout(function () { isClickScrolling = false; }, 1200);
      });

      fixedNavBtns[desktopHref] = btn;
      inner.appendChild(btn);
    });

    fixedNav.appendChild(inner);
    document.body.appendChild(fixedNav);

    // Reference elements for show/hide logic
    var heroHeader = document.querySelector('.header-section.header-section--with-banner');
    var footer     = document.querySelector('footer.footer');

    // Find last section panel that exists in DOM
    var lastSection = null;
    var sectionIds  = Object.values(TAB_MAP);
    for (var i = sectionIds.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      var candidate = document.querySelector(sectionIds[i]);
      if (candidate) { lastSection = candidate; break; }
    }

    // Debounce via rAF to prevent rapid show/hide glitching on scroll
    var visibilityTimer = null;
    function scheduleVisibilityUpdate() {
      if (visibilityTimer) return;
      visibilityTimer = requestAnimationFrame(function () {
        visibilityTimer = null;
        updateNavVisibility();
      });
    }

    function updateNavVisibility() {
      // Hide while the hero header is still at least partially on screen
      if (heroHeader) {
        var heroRect = heroHeader.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (heroRect.bottom > 0) {
          hideNav();
          return;
        }
      }

      // Hide once the footer starts entering the viewport
      if (footer) {
        var footerRect = footer.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (footerRect.top <= window.innerHeight) {
          hideNav();
          return;
        }
      }

      // Hide once the user has scrolled completely past all tab sections
      if (lastSection) {
        var lastRect = lastSection.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (lastRect.bottom < 0) {
          hideNav();
          return;
        }
      }

      showNav();
    }

    window.addEventListener('scroll', scheduleVisibilityUpdate, { passive: true });
    // Delay initial check until after forceAccordionOpen() has set height:auto
    setTimeout(updateNavVisibility, 400);
  }

  function forceAccordionOpen() {
    if (!isMobile()) return;
    Object.values(TAB_MAP).forEach(function (mobileHref) {
      var panel = document.querySelector(mobileHref);
      if (!panel) return;
      panel.classList.add('in');
      panel.style.height     = 'auto';
      panel.style.display    = 'block';
      panel.style.visibility = 'visible';
      var trigger = document.querySelector(
        'a[href="' + mobileHref + '"][data-toggle="collapse"]'
      );
      if (trigger) {
        trigger.classList.remove('collapsed');
        trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
      }
    });
  }

  function forceAllPanesVisible() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.tours-tabs .tab-content > .tab-pane').forEach(function (pane) {
      pane.style.display    = 'block';
      pane.style.opacity    = '1';
      pane.style.visibility = 'visible';
    });
  }

  function insertSectionTitles() {
    var isDesktop = !isMobile();
    document.querySelectorAll('.tours-tabs').forEach(function (wrap) {
      var nav = wrap.querySelector('ul.nav.nav-tabs');
      if (!nav) return;
      nav.querySelectorAll('a[data-toggle="tab"]').forEach(function (a, idx) {
        var href = a.getAttribute('href');
        if (!href || href.charAt(0) !== '#') return;
        var pane = wrap.querySelector(href);
        if (!pane || pane.dataset.heTitleAdded === '1') return;
        if (idx === 0 && isDesktop) { pane.dataset.heTitleAdded = '1'; return; }
        var content = pane.querySelector('.tours-tabscontent.padding-all') || pane;
        if (content.querySelector('.he-tour-section-title')) {
          pane.dataset.heTitleAdded = '1'; return;
        }
        var title = document.createElement('div');
        title.className = 'he-tour-section-title';
        title.setAttribute('role', 'heading');
        title.setAttribute('aria-level', '2');
        title.textContent = (a.textContent || '').trim();
        content.insertBefore(title, content.firstChild);
        pane.dataset.heTitleAdded = '1';
      });
    });
  }

  function fixStickyAncestors() {
    var navTabs = document.querySelector('.tours-tabs .nav-tabs');
    if (!navTabs) return;
    var parent = navTabs.parentElement;
    while (parent && parent !== document.body && parent !== document.documentElement) {
      var style = window.getComputedStyle(parent);
      if (style.overflow === 'hidden' || style.overflowY === 'hidden' || style.overflowX === 'hidden') {
        parent.style.overflow = 'visible';
      }
      parent = parent.parentElement;
    }
  }

  function setupScrollSpy() {
    var nav = document.querySelector('.tours-tabs ul.nav.nav-tabs');
    if (!nav) return;

    var entries = [];
    SECTION_ORDER.forEach(function (desktopHref) {
      var tabLink = nav.querySelector('a[href="' + desktopHref + '"]');
      if (!tabLink) return;
      entries.push({ desktopHref: desktopHref, link: tabLink });
    });

    if (!entries.length) return;

    setSourceActive(entries[0].desktopHref);
    setFixedActive(entries[0].desktopHref);

    var ticking = false;

    function onScroll() {
      if (ticking) return;
      ticking = true;
      requestAnimationFrame(function () {
        ticking = false;
        if (isClickScrolling) return;

        var scrollPos    = window.pageYOffset;
        var triggerLine  = scrollPos + getFixedNavHeight() + 40;
        var scrollBottom = scrollPos + window.innerHeight;
        var docHeight    = document.documentElement.scrollHeight;
        var activeHref   = entries[0].desktopHref;

        if (scrollBottom >= docHeight - 15) {
          activeHref = entries[entries.length - 1].desktopHref;
        } else {
          for (var i = entries.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            var el = getScrollTarget(entries[i].desktopHref);
            if (el && triggerLine >= getOffsetTop(el)) {
              activeHref = entries[i].desktopHref;
              break;
            }
          }
        }

        setSourceActive(activeHref);
        setFixedActive(activeHref);
      });
    }

    window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
    setTimeout(onScroll, 500);
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    var a = e.target.closest('.tours-tabs ul.nav.nav-tabs a[data-toggle="tab"]');
    if (!a) return;
    var desktopHref = a.getAttribute('href');
    if (!desktopHref || desktopHref.charAt(0) !== '#') return;
    var scrollEl = getScrollTarget(desktopHref);
    if (!scrollEl) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    isClickScrolling = true;
    setSourceActive(desktopHref);
    setFixedActive(desktopHref);
    smoothScrollTo(scrollEl);
    setTimeout(forceAllPanesVisible, 50);
    setTimeout(function () { isClickScrolling = false; }, 1200);
  }, true);

  function init() {
    fixStickyAncestors();
    insertSectionTitles();
    forceAllPanesVisible();
    forceAccordionOpen();
    buildFixedNav();
    setupScrollSpy();
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();


/* =========================================================
   Itinerary Accordion — Expand / Collapse
   ========================================================= */
(function () {
  function initItineraryAccordion() {
    var timelines = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-pane .timeline, .panel-body .timeline');
    if (!timelines.length) return;

    timelines.forEach(function (timeline) {
      timeline.querySelectorAll('.timeline__item').forEach(function (item) {
        var title = item.querySelector('.timeline__item__title');
        var desc  = item.querySelector('.timeline__item__description');
        if (!title || !desc) return;

        var existing = title.querySelector('.he-accordion-toggle');
        if (existing) existing.remove();

        var btn = document.createElement('span');
        btn.className = 'he-accordion-toggle';
        btn.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        btn.textContent = '+';
        title.appendChild(btn);

        title.setAttribute('role', 'button');
        title.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
        title.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');

        title.addEventListener('click', function () {
          var isOpen = item.classList.contains('he-open');
          if (isOpen) {
            desc.style.maxHeight = desc.scrollHeight + 'px';
            requestAnimationFrame(function () {
              requestAnimationFrame(function () {
                desc.style.maxHeight = '0';
                item.classList.remove('he-open');
                btn.textContent = '+';
                title.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
              });
            });
          } else {
            item.classList.add('he-open');
            desc.style.maxHeight = desc.scrollHeight + 'px';
            btn.textContent = String.fromCharCode(8722);
            title.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
            desc.addEventListener('transitionend', function onEnd(e) {
              if (e.propertyName === 'max-height' && item.classList.contains('he-open')) {
                desc.style.maxHeight = 'none';
              }
              desc.removeEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);
            });
          }
        });

        title.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
          if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
            e.preventDefault();
            title.click();
          }
        });
      });
    });
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initItineraryAccordion);
  } else {
    initItineraryAccordion();
  }
})();</script><!--Start of Tawk.to Script-->
